message:
🐛 Fix leaderboard: show all contributors, fix include cache bypass (#1618)

* 🐛 Fix leaderboard: include logged-in user, live search filter, show more, raise level thresholds

- Add `include` query param to /api/rewards/leaderboard to ensure current user appears
- Search now live-filters the list as you type (no API call for partial matches)
- Add "Show all N" / "Show top 5" toggle below the leaderboard
- Raise contributor level thresholds (Observer 0, Explorer 500, Navigator 2k, Pilot 5k,
  Commander 15k, Captain 50k, Admiral 150k, Legend 500k) — old thresholds were too low
- Fetch up to 25 entries from backend (frontend controls pagination)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix leaderboard: show all contributors including zero-point, fix include cache bypass

- Remove zero-point contributor skip so everyone appears (even Observer level)
- Fix cache logic: if `include` user is not in cached results, rebuild instead of serving stale data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
